en: You are getting this category because you selected ISO 28002:2011 in the Avetta PQF - ISO Certifications Questionnaire\n\nISO Certificates issued for a prior standard that are still valid and not expired will be accepted. If your organization also has a country specific certificate that is equivalent to the ISO Standard listed below, that certification will also be accepted as long as it is still valid.
ISO 28002 - Security Management Systems for the Supply Chain
Please upload your ISO 28002:2011 - Security Management Systems for the Supply Chain — Development of Resilience in the Supply Chain — Requirements with Guidance for use certificate:
Please enter the certificate expiration date:\n
